rag_rules: Fix unresolved references in AGREE contracts by ensuring all identifiers are visible or properly declared in the same annex scope.
When AGREE reports type errors, trace the first invalid identifier on the same line and resolve the root cause or remove the clause.
generic_rules: Validator diagnostics indicating unresolved references or type mismatches should be addressed by correcting the underlying symbol resolution or expression types.
AGREE contracts must use only visible identifiers or helper declarations within the same annex scope to avoid <error> type issues.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must have consistent types on both sides of binary operators like '=' and '<='.
Valid AGREE clauses must reference named things that are expressions with valid types, not <error>.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements to fix AGREE diagnostics; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses.
irrelevant_topics: Component type vs implementation scope placement
